description: A week after an ad campaign launch, an advertiser wants a performance report.

nodes.task_description: Identify the specific ad campaign in the ad management system.
Retrieve the key performance metrics for the campaign (impressions, click-through rate, video completion rate).

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls a report with all the required metrics.

nodes.task_description: Format the metrics into a clear, concise report and send it to the advertiser.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates and sends a well-formatted report.
